title: ModuleFrontmatter
description: Schema for the YAML frontmatter of a Super-Model top-level skill module.

name.description: Module identifier; matches the file basename without extension.

description.description: When to use this module / what it scans or does. Used by the GUI.

severity_default.description: Default severity for findings produced by this module. Optional; for review-style modules.

fix_policy.description: Whether and how this module applies fixes.

agent.description: If dispatch=subagent, which agent type to use.

hooks_provided.description: Hook points this module provides (super-execute backends only).

hooks_consumed.description: Hook points this module attaches to (super-execute policy modules only). Maps hook name -> handler name.

risk_assessment.description: Whether this module must produce per-fix risk metadata.

dependencies.description: Other module names this module depends on.

enabled_by_default.description: Whether this module is enabled in the shipped default config.
